title: Miami Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Miami, with a Z-Score of +3.51. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10 and a Level of CRITICAL.
body:
The current weather conditions in Miami are characterized by high temperatures and high humidity, with an Umidita of 64% and a Vento of 12.4 km/h. 
 The heat wave is expected to continue, with a CDD of 11.3 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating demand, and the city's infrastructure is likely to be stressed due to the high energy consumption.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
